name: session-end-commit.js
purpose: CLI entry point that marks SESSION_CONTEXT.md as committed, commits only that file with SKIP env vars for doc checks, and pushes to the current branch at session end.
notes: Uses execFileSync with args arrays throughout (no shell injection). References scripts/log-override.js which was NOT found in directory listing — possible dead reference or absent file. Hard-codes SESSION_CONTEXT.md and branch-push behavior; portable to any git repo but assumes SESSION_CONTEXT.md convention.

name: propagation-patterns.seed.json
purpose: Seed data defining security anti-patterns and their preferred replacements, used to bootstrap a pattern-compliance detector or propagation system.
notes: Data-only JSON config. Four patterns: error-sanitization, path-traversal-check, file-read-try-catch, exec-loop-global-flag. Maps to CLAUDE.md section 5 Anti-Patterns table exactly. No runtime; consumed by a detector script (not present in this tree).

name: sanitize-error.cjs
purpose: Canonical CJS error sanitization library that strips secrets, home paths, connection strings, and internal IPs from error messages before logging.
notes: Single source of truth per its own docstring — a prior .js twin was removed as dead code. SENSITIVE_PATTERNS covers home dirs (Win+Unix), credential kv-pairs, bearer tokens, DB connection strings, env var refs, internal IPs, localhost URLs. Required by security-helpers.js, todos-mutations.js, planning/lib/read-jsonl.js, todos-cli.js. The .d.ts sibling provides TypeScript types.

name: sanitize-error.d.ts
purpose: TypeScript declaration file providing type-safe interface for the sanitize-error.cjs module (avoids tsx circular resolution).
notes: Not a .ts file by design — using .d.ts avoids tsx infinite-recursion when .ts re-exports from .js. Paired with sanitize-error.cjs. No runtime behavior.

name: security-helpers.js
purpose: Comprehensive security utility library providing path traversal prevention, symlink guards, safe file writes, git operation wrappers, CLI arg parsing, SSRF URL validation, regex safety, PII masking, and slug generation.
notes: Central security library mandated by CLAUDE.md section 2. Imports isSafeToWrite from .claude/hooks/lib/symlink-guard with graceful fallback. Re-exports sanitizeError from sanitize-error.cjs. Pattern refs cite CODE_PATTERNS.md (#17,#18,#31-#41). validateUrl includes SSRF hardening with octal/decimal IP bypass blocks.

name: safe-fs.js
purpose: Secure filesystem wrapper library providing symlink-guarded writes, atomic write (tmp+rename), BOM-stripping reads, size-guarded reads, chunked JSONL line streaming, and advisory file locking.
notes: Largest lib file (23 KB). Trust model explicitly documented: defense-in-depth for single-user CLI, NOT a privilege boundary. Three-path isSafeToWrite resolution: scripts/lib path then skill-local path then inline fallback. Advisory locking uses Atomics.wait for sleep (no busy-spin). EXDEV cross-device rename fallback for Windows. Explicitly copied verbatim into .claude/skills/*/scripts/lib/ as per-skill helper.

name: parse-jsonl-line.js
purpose: Shared helpers for safely parsing a single JSONL line, created to satisfy a pre-commit pattern-compliance detector requiring JSON.parse inside try/catch with a specific shape.
notes: Exists specifically to satisfy pre-commit pattern detector (Reviews 353/357/358). Two variants: safeParseLine (null on error, silent) and safeParseLineWithError (returns {value,error} for callers reporting bad line positions). Pure — no I/O, no external deps.

name: read-jsonl.js
purpose: Simple JSONL file reader that parses all lines, skipping blanks and malformed JSON with warnings; exits on file read error unless safe mode is enabled.
notes: CJS module. Different from planning/lib/read-jsonl.js — simpler whole-file reader (no streaming, no comment support). Loads full file into memory; subject to 2 MiB ceiling concern. No dependency on safe-fs or sanitize-error — less hardened than its planning counterpart.

name: todos-mutations.js
purpose: Pure CJS functions for /todo skill JSONL mutations — validation, integrity checks, regression guard, and all CRUD operations — extracted for testability without CLI side effects.
notes: Exists to prevent data loss (T26/T27/T28 scenario where context compaction caused stale reads to drop records). assertRegressionGuard refuses writes if id set or line-count delta diverges from expectations. Uses RegExp.prototype.exec via explicit prototype call to avoid false-positive hook trigger on literal substring. CJS module consumed via createRequire from ESM todos-cli.js.

name: render-todos.js
purpose: ESM script and importable function that generates TODOS.md from .planning/todos.jsonl, sorted by priority and status, with sections for active/completed/archived todos.
notes: ESM module with dual-mode: runs as script when invoked directly (entry-point guard via pathToFileURL comparison), or imported as library by todos-cli.js. Renders to .planning/TODOS.md via safeWriteFileSync. Depends on planning/lib/read-jsonl.js (ESM streaming variant), not scripts/lib/read-jsonl.js.

name: todos-cli.js
purpose: ESM CLI entry point for all /todo skill JSONL mutations — acquires advisory lock, validates integrity pre/post, runs pure mutation ops, atomically writes result, then re-renders TODOS.md.
notes: ESM module mixing ESM imports with createRequire for CJS deps (todos-mutations.js). Full pipeline: lock, load, pre-flight integrity, dispatch, regression guard, post-flight integrity, atomic write, render. Dispatches 8 subcommands. Exit codes: 0=success, 1=user error, 2=fatal. Render step runs outside lock — render-todos.js does its own write.

name: package.json
purpose: Scoped package.json declaring the planning scripts subdirectory as an ESM module boundary, silencing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warnings without converting root CJS scripts to ESM.
notes: type:module scopes ESM to scripts/planning/ only. Private, no publishing. Root package.json stays untyped CJS. Critical for mixed CJS/ESM coexistence in scripts/.

name: read-jsonl.js
purpose: ESM JSONL parser for planning scripts that streams lines via safe-fs.js streamLinesSync, handles comment lines and CRLF, caps parse-error warnings at 25, and exports a Markdown cell escaper.
notes: ESM module using createRequire to consume CJS deps (safe-fs, sanitize-error). Streaming avoids 2 MiB ceiling. MAX_WARNINGS=25 prevents log DoS on corrupted JSONL. Skips comment lines with // prefix. Exports escapeCell for Markdown table rendering. Distinct from scripts/lib/read-jsonl.js which is simpler, CJS, whole-file.
